case.title: 维修厂发布询价
case.description: 维修厂账号登录后，使用 VIN LBVFR790XBSD31722 和配件名称火花塞发布询价，并校验进入询价详情页且生成 B 开头询价单号。

test_step.data: (async()=>{const sleep=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const norm=s=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,'').trim();const visible=el=>!!el&&el.isConnected&&!!(el.offsetWidth||el.offsetHeight||el.getClientRects().length);for(let i=0;i<20;i++){const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('.br-modal button,.br-modal a,[role=dialog] button,[role=dialog] a,button,a')].find(el=>visible(el)&&(norm(el.textContent).includes('不追加，发布新的询价单')||norm(el.textContent).includes('不追加')||norm(el.textContent).includes('发布新询价单')));if(btn){btn.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});btn.click();await sleep(500);return 'duplicate_vin_modal_confirmed';}if(document.querySelector('table textarea, table input:not([disabled])'))return 'no_duplicate_vin_modal';await sleep(250);}return 'duplicate_vin_modal_not_present';})()

(async()=>{const sleep=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const visible=el=>!!el&&el.isConnected&&!!(el.offsetWidth||el.offsetHeight||el.getClientRects().length);const enabled=el=>visible(el)&&!el.disabled&&!String(el.className||'').includes('disabled');for(let i=0;i<80;i++){const btn=document.querySelector('.save-inquiry,input.save-inquiry')||[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input,span')].find(el=>visible(el)&&(el.value==='发布询价'||String(el.textContent||'').trim()==='发布询价'));if(enabled(btn))return 'publish_button_ready';await sleep(250);}throw new Error('发布询价按钮未就绪，页面文本='+(document.body.innerText||'').slice(0,300));})()

(()=>{const norm=s=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,'').trim();const visible=el=>!!el&&el.isConnected&&!!(el.offsetWidth||el.offsetHeight||el.getClientRects().length);const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('.br-modal button,.br-modal a,[role=dialog] button,[role=dialog] a,button,a')].find(el=>visible(el)&&(norm(el.textContent).includes('不追加，发布新询价单')||norm(el.textContent).includes('不追加，发布新的询价单')||norm(el.textContent).includes('不追加')));if(btn){btn.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});btn.click();return 'publish_duplicate_vin_new_inquiry_clicked';}return 'publish_duplicate_vin_modal_not_present';})()

(()=>{const text=document.body.innerText||'';if(!text.includes('LBVFR790XBSD31722'))throw new Error('发布成功页未展示目标VIN：LBVFR790XBSD31722');const m=text.match(/询价单[：:\s]*(B[A-Za-z0-9]+)/)||text.match(/\b(B[A-Za-z0-9]{6,})\b/);if(!m)throw new Error('未提取到B开头询价单号，页面文本='+text.slice(0,300));return m[1];})()
